title: Sneaky Sodium
description: Just hides away the Sodium video settings, because I like a vanilla feel of the game.
body:
## Motivation
I have a strangely nostalgic relation with the game,
and though I really like having Sodium installed for some extra performance,
the modern-style video settings it offers kind of break the immersion for me.
Generally, I just prefer the vanilla feel everywhere and for all the utility
mods to be out of view.

## Functionality (there's just one)
It will hide away the Sodium video settings.

This mod just flips around the `shift + p` keybind functionality in Sodium.
Vanilla video settings will be opened by default and the Sodium video settings
will still be available behind that key combo.

## Installation
It just requires Sodium itself (duh).
